name: Wild Blueberry & Avocado Smoothie Bowl
description: A vibrant, creamy smoothie bowl packed with omega-3s, antioxidants, and gut-friendly ingredients.
recipeInstructions: Blend the base: Add frozen wild blueberries, frozen banana, baby spinach, chia seeds, unsweetened coconut milk, avocado, and fresh ginger to a high-speed blender. Blend until completely smooth and very thick.
Top & serve: Pour into a wide bowl. Top with hemp seeds. Serve immediately.
